## Apotris Android — Nightly

**Universal** APK with **arm64-v8a**, **armeabi-v7a**, **x86**, and **x86_64** native libraries. **arm64-only** APK (smaller; 64-bit devices only).

### Download latest

Use the [**nightly release page**](https://github.com/SanGraphic/Apotris-Android/releases/tag/nightly) to pick assets, or direct links below.

#### Universal (multi-ABI)

| | |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Release page** | [Apotris Android — Nightly](https://github.com/SanGraphic/Apotris-Android/releases/tag/nightly) |
| **Direct download** | [`apotris-universal.apk`](https://github.com/SanGraphic/Apotris-Android/releases/download/nightly/apotris-universal.apk) *(present when the last workflow run built universal)* |

#### arm64-v8a only

| | |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Release page** | [Apotris Android — Nightly](https://github.com/SanGraphic/Apotris-Android/releases/tag/nightly) |
| **Direct download** | [`apotris-arm64-v8a.apk`](https://github.com/SanGraphic/Apotris-Android/releases/download/nightly/apotris-arm64-v8a.apk) |

### Build

- Universal: `build-universal.ps1`
- arm64-v8a: `build.ps1`
- Branch: `main`

---

*This **nightly** release is updated by CI from the latest `main` commit. Reinstall the APK to update. You may need to allow installs from unknown sources.*
